checked.note: verified in a running system - human visual pass 2026-07-19 over all apps: the element binding {/S_PRODUCT} resolves all relative field bindings incl. the Currency number - the ObjectHeader renders fully populated.

deviations.what: the ObjectHeader keeps the original element binding and relative field bindings 1:1 (title, numberUnit, the ObjectAttribute composite texts and the sap.ui.model.type.Currency number binding); only the binding context path changes - a one-record structure /S_PRODUCT in the default model instead of {/ProductCollection/0}, since the port does not carry the whole collection.
the model holds exactly the bound record /ProductCollection/0 (Notebook Basic 15) of ui5/mock/products.json, verbatim.
